name: Double Dill Bread
recipeInstructions:
1. Dissolve yeast in warm water.
2. Heat cottage cheese until lukewarm.
3. Remove from heat and add sugar, herbs, margarine, onion, salt, soda, egg whites, and yeast/water mixture.
4. Mix until a stiff dough forms.
5. Spray a 1-1/2 quart casserole dish with vegetable coating spray.
6. Turn dough into the casserole dish and allow to rise in a warm place for 30 to 40 minutes (should double in size).
7. Bake at 350°F for 40 to 45 minutes.
8. Serve warm. YIELD: 16 slices (1 slice per serving) Calories 82.40/ Protein 20%/ Carbohydrate 68%/ Fat 12%/ Sod-Mg 160.0 Exchanges: Bread 1.8/ Meat 0.5/ Fat 0.3
